zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir於1158年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾亨利--坦斯時，他的父親Anschetil de Grey28歲，母親Eva Redvers26歲。他和Elana de Clare至少有2個兒子。他去世於1198年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯坦德拉可享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir was born in 1158, in Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Anschetil de Grey, was 28 and his mother, Eva Redvers, was 26. He had at least 2 sons with Elana de Clare. He died in 1198, in Standlake, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir est né en 1158, à Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Anschetil de Grey, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eva Redvers, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Elana de Clare. Il est décédé en 1198, à Standlake, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir(이)가 1158년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 헨리--섬스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anschetil de Grey(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva Redvers(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Elana de Clare(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1198년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스탠들레이크에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Thurrock John De Grey Sir родился в 1158 г. в местности хенли-он-тамесь, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Anschetil de Grey было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva Redvers, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Elana de Clare. Он умер в 1198 г. в местности стандлеик, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.
